name: Connectable Vector of Systems
description: Definition of a connection vector of systems where all components are discrete systems and are pairwise distinct.

elements.text: VSCR is a connection vector of systems iff: (i) either VSCR ∈ DSYSTEMS or VSCR is an n-tuple for some n ∈ IJS+ of the form VSCR = (Z1, ..., Zn) for n ∈ IJS+ and Zi ∈ DSYSTEMS for every i ∈ IJS[1, n].
(ii) if {i, j} ⊆ IJS[1, n] such that i ≠ j, then Zi ≠ Zj.
